requirements.statement: The enterprise onboarding flow must support SSO login for all customer administrators.
requirements.source_quote: The enterprise onboarding flow must support SSO login for all customer administrators.

requirements.statement: We need SAML authentication with metadata upload for enterprise identity providers.
requirements.source_quote: We need SAML authentication with metadata upload for enterprise identity providers.

requirements.statement: The customer portal must allow admins to invite users by email in bulk.
requirements.source_quote: The customer portal must allow admins to invite users by email in bulk.

requirements.statement: We require uploaded CSV invite files to support at least five thousand rows.
requirements.source_quote: We require uploaded CSV invite files to support at least five thousand rows.
constraints: We require uploaded CSV invite files to support at least five thousand rows.

requirements.statement: The platform must keep audit logs for administrator actions for seven years.
requirements.source_quote: The platform must keep audit logs for administrator actions for seven years.

requirements.statement: Audit logs should include actor, action, timestamp, IP address, and affected resource.
requirements.source_quote: Audit logs should include actor, action, timestamp, IP address, and affected resource.

requirements.statement: Customers need a searchable audit log screen inside the admin console.
requirements.source_quote: Customers need a searchable audit log screen inside the admin console.

requirements.statement: The billing area should export invoice summaries in CSV and PDF format.
requirements.source_quote: The billing area should export invoice summaries in CSV and PDF format.

requirements.statement: Monthly billing exports must include account id, invoice id, tax, credits, and total due.
requirements.source_quote: Monthly billing exports must include account id, invoice id, tax, credits, and total due.

requirements.statement: Account admins need self-service role management for standard, billing, and security roles.
requirements.source_quote: Account admins need self-service role management for standard, billing, and security roles.

requirements.statement: The dashboard must load within two seconds for accounts with up to ten thousand users.
requirements.source_quote: The dashboard must load within two seconds for accounts with up to ten thousand users.
constraints: The dashboard must load within two seconds for accounts with up to ten thousand users.

requirements.statement: The user list should support filtering by status, role, and last login date.
requirements.source_quote: The user list should support filtering by status, role, and last login date.

requirements.statement: The portal must send notification emails for failed SSO setup attempts.
requirements.source_quote: The portal must send notification emails for failed SSO setup attempts.

requirements.statement: The system should detect suspicious login spikes and alert security admins.
requirements.source_quote: The system should detect suspicious login spikes and alert security admins.

requirements.statement: We need daily usage metrics exported to the analytics warehouse.
requirements.source_quote: We need daily usage metrics exported to the analytics warehouse.

requirements.statement: Usage metrics must include active users, API calls, storage usage, and workspace count.
requirements.source_quote: Usage metrics must include active users, API calls, storage usage, and workspace count.

requirements.statement: The API should expose a health endpoint for uptime monitoring.
requirements.source_quote: The API should expose a health endpoint for uptime monitoring.

requirements.statement: The health endpoint must report database, cache, and queue status.
requirements.source_quote: The health endpoint must report database, cache, and queue status.

requirements.statement: The application must support custom branding for enterprise customers.
requirements.source_quote: The application must support custom branding for enterprise customers.

requirements.statement: Branding should include logo upload, primary color, and email footer text.
requirements.source_quote: Branding should include logo upload, primary color, and email footer text.

requirements.statement: Data deletion requests must complete within thirty days.
requirements.source_quote: Data deletion requests must complete within thirty days.
constraints: Data deletion requests must complete within thirty days.

requirements.statement: The deletion workflow should create an immutable evidence record.
requirements.source_quote: The deletion workflow should create an immutable evidence record.

requirements.statement: Customers require an in-app support ticket widget.
requirements.source_quote: Customers require an in-app support ticket widget.

requirements.statement: Support tickets should attach the current page URL and account id automatically.
requirements.source_quote: Support tickets should attach the current page URL and account id automatically.

requirements.statement: The roadmap requires workspace-level feature flags.
requirements.source_quote: The roadmap requires workspace-level feature flags.

requirements.statement: Feature flags should be editable by internal operators only.
requirements.source_quote: Feature flags should be editable by internal operators only.

requirements.statement: We need rate limiting for public API endpoints.
requirements.source_quote: We need rate limiting for public API endpoints.

requirements.statement: API rate limits must be configurable per enterprise contract.
requirements.source_quote: API rate limits must be configurable per enterprise contract.

requirements.statement: The system should notify billing owners before payment method expiration.
requirements.source_quote: The system should notify billing owners before payment method expiration.

requirements.statement: Payment expiration alerts must be sent thirty days, seven days, and one day before expiration.
requirements.source_quote: Payment expiration alerts must be sent thirty days, seven days, and one day before expiration.

requirements.statement: Admins need an account activity digest email every Monday.
requirements.source_quote: Admins need an account activity digest email every Monday.

requirements.statement: The digest should summarize new users, deleted users, failed logins, and billing changes.
requirements.source_quote: The digest should summarize new users, deleted users, failed logins, and billing changes.

requirements.statement: The system must support regional data residency for EU customers.
requirements.source_quote: The system must support regional data residency for EU customers.

requirements.statement: EU customer data should remain in EU storage and compute regions.
requirements.source_quote: EU customer data should remain in EU storage and compute regions.

requirements.statement: Backups must run every day and support point-in-time recovery.
requirements.source_quote: Backups must run every day and support point-in-time recovery.

requirements.statement: Recovery point objective should be no more than fifteen minutes.
requirements.source_quote: Recovery point objective should be no more than fifteen minutes.
constraints: Recovery point objective should be no more than fifteen minutes.

requirements.statement: We require encryption at rest for all customer documents.
requirements.source_quote: We require encryption at rest for all customer documents.

requirements.statement: Customer document encryption keys should rotate every ninety days.
requirements.source_quote: Customer document encryption keys should rotate every ninety days.

requirements.statement: The analytics export must not include customer secrets or authentication tokens.
requirements.source_quote: The analytics export must not include customer secrets or authentication tokens.

requirements.statement: Analytics records should be pseudonymized before export.
requirements.source_quote: Analytics records should be pseudonymized before export.

requirements.statement: The admin console should show clear error messages for failed CSV imports.
requirements.source_quote: The admin console should show clear error messages for failed CSV imports.

requirements.statement: CSV import errors must identify the row number and failed field.
requirements.source_quote: CSV import errors must identify the row number and failed field.

requirements.statement: The portal needs a read-only auditor role.
requirements.source_quote: The portal needs a read-only auditor role.

requirements.statement: Auditor users should see reports and logs but cannot change settings.
requirements.source_quote: Auditor users should see reports and logs but cannot change settings.

requirements.statement: The application must support legal hold for selected customer accounts.
requirements.source_quote: The application must support legal hold for selected customer accounts.

requirements.statement: Legal hold should prevent deletion until the hold is removed.
requirements.source_quote: Legal hold should prevent deletion until the hold is removed.

requirements.statement: The engineering team needs deployment status visible to internal operators.
requirements.source_quote: The engineering team needs deployment status visible to internal operators.

requirements.statement: Deployment status should show version, environment, region, and last deploy time.
requirements.source_quote: Deployment status should show version, environment, region, and last deploy time.

requirements.statement: The mobile layout must support the billing summary and usage dashboard.
requirements.source_quote: The mobile layout must support the billing summary and usage dashboard.

requirements.statement: Mobile pages should preserve the same permission model as desktop.
requirements.source_quote: Mobile pages should preserve the same permission model as desktop.

requirements.statement: The customer portal must support passwordless login for enterprise users.
requirements.source_quote: The customer portal must support passwordless login for enterprise users.

requirements.statement: We need audit logs retained for at least seven years for regulated customers.
requirements.source_quote: We need audit logs retained for at least seven years for regulated customers.
constraints: We need audit logs retained for at least seven years for regulated customers.

requirements.statement: The system should export monthly billing reports in CSV format.
requirements.source_quote: The system should export monthly billing reports in CSV format.

requirements.statement: We require response time under two seconds for dashboard page loads.
requirements.source_quote: We require response time under two seconds for dashboard page loads.
constraints: We require response time under two seconds for dashboard page loads.

requirements.statement: The roadmap needs self-service role management for account administrators.
requirements.source_quote: The roadmap needs self-service role management for account administrators.

solutions.what: We implemented SSO login for enterprise administrators using SAML and FastAPI.
solutions.source_quote: We implemented SSO login for enterprise administrators using SAML and FastAPI.

solutions.what: The SAML service supports metadata upload and validates identity provider certificates.
solutions.source_quote: The SAML service supports metadata upload and validates identity provider certificates.

solutions.what: Bulk user invites are implemented with CSV parsing and async processing.
solutions.source_quote: Bulk user invites are implemented with CSV parsing and async processing.

solutions.what: The invite worker currently supports ten thousand CSV rows per upload.
solutions.source_quote: The invite worker currently supports ten thousand CSV rows per upload.

solutions.what: Administrator audit logging is built in Postgres with seven year retention.
solutions.source_quote: Administrator audit logging is built in Postgres with seven year retention.

solutions.what: The searchable audit log screen is implemented in the admin console.
solutions.source_quote: The searchable audit log screen is implemented in the admin console.

solutions.what: PDF invoice export is deferred until the next billing milestone.
solutions.source_quote: PDF invoice export is deferred until the next billing milestone.
deferred: PDF invoice export is deferred until the next billing milestone.

solutions.what: Role management is currently read-only and self-service editing is out of scope for this release.
solutions.source_quote: Role management is currently read-only and self-service editing is out of scope for this release.
scope_limits: Role management is currently read-only and self-service editing is out of scope for this release.

solutions.what: The user list supports filtering by status, role, and last login date.
solutions.source_quote: The user list supports filtering by status, role, and last login date.

solutions.what: Dashboard performance work is deferred until after the analytics migration.
solutions.source_quote: Dashboard performance work is deferred until after the analytics migration.
deferred: Dashboard performance work is deferred until after the analytics migration.

solutions.what: Failed SSO setup emails are implemented through the notification service.
solutions.source_quote: Failed SSO setup emails are implemented through the notification service.

solutions.what: Daily usage metrics are exported to the analytics warehouse using the batch pipeline.
solutions.source_quote: Daily usage metrics are exported to the analytics warehouse using the batch pipeline.

solutions.what: Usage export includes active users, API calls, storage usage, and workspace count.
solutions.source_quote: Usage export includes active users, API calls, storage usage, and workspace count.

solutions.what: The API health endpoint is implemented for uptime monitoring.
solutions.source_quote: The API health endpoint is implemented for uptime monitoring.

solutions.what: The health endpoint reports database, Redis cache, and queue status.
solutions.source_quote: The health endpoint reports database, Redis cache, and queue status.

solutions.what: Custom branding supports logo upload and primary color configuration.
solutions.source_quote: Custom branding supports logo upload and primary color configuration.

solutions.what: Data deletion workflow is implemented with a thirty day SLA.
solutions.source_quote: Data deletion workflow is implemented with a thirty day SLA.

solutions.what: The in-app support ticket widget is implemented in the admin console.
solutions.source_quote: The in-app support ticket widget is implemented in the admin console.

solutions.what: Workspace-level feature flags are implemented for internal operators.
solutions.source_quote: Workspace-level feature flags are implemented for internal operators.

solutions.what: Public API rate limiting is implemented with Redis token buckets.
solutions.source_quote: Public API rate limiting is implemented with Redis token buckets.

solutions.what: Per-contract enterprise rate limit configuration is not implemented yet.
solutions.source_quote: Per-contract enterprise rate limit configuration is not implemented yet.

solutions.what: Payment method expiration notifications are implemented for billing owners.
solutions.source_quote: Payment method expiration notifications are implemented for billing owners.

solutions.what: Monday account activity digest emails are implemented.
solutions.source_quote: Monday account activity digest emails are implemented.

solutions.what: Customer documents are encrypted at rest using managed cloud keys.
solutions.source_quote: Customer documents are encrypted at rest using managed cloud keys.

solutions.what: Ninety day customer document key rotation is implemented.
solutions.source_quote: Ninety day customer document key rotation is implemented.

solutions.what: Read-only auditor role is implemented for reports and logs.
solutions.source_quote: Read-only auditor role is implemented for reports and logs.

solutions.what: Mobile usage dashboard is deferred until the responsive layout sprint.
solutions.source_quote: Mobile usage dashboard is deferred until the responsive layout sprint.

solutions.what: We implemented passwordless login using email magic links and FastAPI endpoints.
solutions.source_quote: We implemented passwordless login using email magic links and FastAPI endpoints.

solutions.what: Audit logging is built with Postgres tables and retention policies for seven years.
solutions.source_quote: Audit logging is built with Postgres tables and retention policies for seven years.

solutions.what: The billing service supports CSV export for monthly invoice reports.
solutions.source_quote: The billing service supports CSV export for monthly invoice reports.

solutions.what: Dashboard optimization is deferred until the next performance sprint.
solutions.source_quote: Dashboard optimization is deferred until the next performance sprint.

gaps.requirement_statement: The customer portal must allow admins to invite users by email in bulk.
evidence: Closest solution SOL-0024 scored 0.14: Customer documents are encrypted at rest using managed cloud keys.
gaps.recommendation: Confirm ownership and add an engineering solution that explicitly covers this requirement.
